_comment: Suricata(IDS) EVE alert の実観測シグネチャ。by_signature（prefetch）由来。malicious=実攻撃寄り / benign=スキャナ/情報系。severity は ET の慣習（1=高,3=低）。

malicious_signatures.signature: ET SCAN JAWS Webserver Unauthenticated Shell Command Execution
ET EXPLOIT Possible CVE-2020-11900 IP-in-IP tunnel Double-Free
ET EXPLOIT Possible CVE-2020-11910 anomalous ICMPv4 type 3,code 4 Path MTU Discovery

benign_signatures.signature: ET INFO SSH session in progress on Expected Port
GPL ICMP Destination Unreachable Communication with Destination Host is Administratively Prohibited
ET INFO Potentially unsafe SMBv1 protocol in use
ET INFO SSH session in progress on Unusual Port
